Review_Content:
I am not going to get into the thick of it for this review, as I am assuming most of you who are getting an iPhone 14 Pro Max already know why Apple makes great phones. So for this I will give you my perspective on what sticks out and how it has gone for me so far upgrading from the iPhone 12 Pro to the iPhone 14 Pro Max:


THINGS I LIKED:
- The new “eSim” technology means no more SIM cards needed! I think that is going to be very convenient for a lot of people out there who only ever use 1 phone and do not need the hassle of messing with those little SIM cards. Seriously it was very easy to set up via Verizon and I was able to do the whole setup at home.
- The screen is gorgeous! I love how big the screen is, along with the great clarity/colors it produces, and the 120hz refresh rate made everything feel sooo smooth and fast. Very happy with his aspect!
- The new “Dynamic Island” (aka the pill notch instead of the notch they use in the past) is a clever idea. It adds more space to the screen and they do a great job of incorporating apps into the dynamic island. Whether I am taking phone calls, using Spotify, or navigating with maps, its a nice animation to have everything housed there.
- The always on display is a nice new feature to have so you can see everything at a glance without having to unlock the screen.
- The camera is BIG on the back but it takes excellent pictures and videos. Seriously the pictures look wonderful with a lot of detail and the new video modes are nice to have and capture everything really smoothly.
- Also the speakers are much louder and clearer than before, the processor in this thing is super fast, and my WiFi / 5G connections are very strong so far as well!
- Finally, I am really excited for the battery life on this! I have not used it long enough to provide a better perspective, but from what I have read this thing should be long lasting on those big heavy using phone days.

SIZE DIFFERENCE (12 Pro —> 14 Pro Max):
- This is of course a much larger phone than the 12 Pro, but instantly the 14 Pro Max felt great in my hands. I like having more of the real estate for reading articles, typing emails, and more space for watching videos.
- The phone is of course bigger to handle and heavier too. Initially is feels like a lot but I have gotten more use to it the more I use it for sure.
- Overall, I am glad I made the jump to the bigger screen size and I think that I will enjoy having the larger screen more than I will miss having a smaller more portable phone.

THINGS I WISH WERE DIFFERENT:
- As I said before, I wish this phone was thinner and lighter. It’s not like its a deal breaker for me, but it is a big phone.
- Still charges via lightening, I wish it was USB-C
- Lastly, the Always on Display is a nice option to have but I likely will not use it much. It would be nice if you could have always on display only turned on during certain times or when you have a certain focus mode turned on. But that could be a software update later on.

BOTTOM LINE:
- I was coming from the iPhone 12 Pro and upgrading to the 14 Pro Max is definitely a worthy upgrade! The screen is beautiful, everything is very fast and responsive, the camera is a major upgrade, and overall I feel like I am getting a new phone with noticeable improvements, which is all any of us really want! We want to feel like we bought something that is better than we had before, and I think the 14 Pro Max really nails it!
The best there is! Amazing camera quality and the design is really ergonomic!

It took a couple hours to get it activated even with assistance from Verizon staff.  The phone is beautiful though and it really doesn’t feel or work much different than my iPhone 12.  What I am really impressed by is the fact that I was able to purchase this phone with such ease through Best Buy when Verizon made it a nightmare to purchase from them even though I’m already a customer.  I will always go through Best Buy from now own to purchase my electronics.

Two years ago, I upgraded to the iPhone 14 Pro Max 128GB in Space Black (Verizon), and I am absolutely blown away by its performance! From the stunning design to the powerful features, this phone is everything I was hoping for and more.

First, the display is absolutely gorgeous. The 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion is incredibly smooth, making everything from scrolling through apps to watching videos feel ultra-responsive and immersive. The colors are vibrant, and the brightness is perfect for outdoor use, even in direct sunlight.

The camera system is phenomenal. The new 48MP main camera captures incredible detail, and the Night Mode works wonders in low-light conditions. I’ve taken some of the best photos I’ve ever snapped, and the video quality, especially in Cinematic Mode, is stunning. It’s like having a professional camera in my pocket.

The A16 Bionic chip makes everything run smoothly and fast. Whether I'm gaming, multitasking, or using demanding apps, the phone handles it with ease. Plus, 5G connectivity with Verizon makes internet speeds blazing fast, which is a huge plus for streaming, gaming, and browsing.

I also love the battery life—I can easily get through an entire day of heavy use without needing to charge, which was always a concern with previous iPhones. The Face ID is incredibly fast and secure, and I love the overall build quality—the Space Black color gives it a sleek, premium feel.

Overall, the iPhone 14 Pro Max is an exceptional phone. It offers a top-tier display, incredible camera capabilities, lightning-fast performance, and great battery life. If you're looking for the best of the best, this is definitely the phone to get. Highly recommend it!
